name: Veoneer, Inc.
description: Veoneer is a world leader in automotive safety electronics, dedicated to the purpose of protecting everyone in every crash. The company designs, manufactures, and sells advanced restraint control systems, sensors, and electronic control units to major automotive manufacturers globally. With a rich heritage in automotive safety development, Veoneer focuses on sustainable mobility and innovative technology to improve traffic safety. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, the company operates across multiple countries, leveraging its extensive expertise to provide cutting-edge safety solutions that are integrated into a significant portion of vehicles produced worldwide.
